dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your learning, verified.
dashboard.welcomeDesc: Triple-verified AI tutoring for STEM. Here's how to get started:
dashboard.stepCreateDesc: A session is your workspace for a topic — like Calculus or Quantum Physics.
dashboard.stepAskDesc: Ask anything: derivatives, kinematics, balancing equations. The tutor guides you Socratically.
dashboard.stepNextDesc: Every answer is checked by a Solver, Critic and Verifier — and your mastery map updates live.
dashboard.examplePrefill: Find the derivative of f(x) = x³·ln(x) and explain each step.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.subtitle: Your study workspaces.
sessions.subject: Subject (optional)
sessions.noSessionsDesc: Start a session to submit problems and get AI-powered solutions.
sessions.deleteDesc: This will permanently delete "{{title}}" and all its problems. This action cannot be undone.

session.subtitle: AI-powered Socratic tutor
session.emptyDesc: I'll guide you step-by-step using the Socratic method.
session.needSignIn: You need to be signed in before starting a chat.
session.streamInterrupted: The connection dropped before the answer finished. Tap retry to continue.
session.backendUnavailable: We can't reach the tutor right now. Please try again in a moment.
session.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.

tour.step1Desc: Tutor mode guides you Socratically. Answer mode gives the result first, steps after. Switch any time from the chat header.
tour.step2Desc: We pre-load a real Calculus problem so you can see how STEMind solves and verifies in one click.
tour.step3Desc: Every solved problem updates your mastery. Visit the Knowledge tab to see weak spots and strong topics.

demo.title: STEMind Demo
demo.subtitle: Local sandbox · nothing is saved
demo.welcomeDesc: Run the example below or type your own STEM question. No signup needed — but progress isn't saved.
demo.prefilledQuestion: Find the derivative of f(x) = x³·ln(x) and explain each step.
demo.upgradeNote: Create a free account to save sessions, track mastery, and build your knowledge graph.

knowledge.title: Knowledge graph
knowledge.subtitle: Your mastery, mapped topic by topic.
knowledge.noTopicsDesc: Solve problems to start building your personal knowledge graph.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your STEMind experience.
settings.languageDesc: Choose the language for the app and AI tutor responses.
settings.appearanceDesc: Switch between light and dark mode.

auth.signinDesc: Sign in to continue solving STEM problems.
auth.guestNote: No email needed. Data is tied to this browser only.
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.welcomeDesc: Your account is ready. Let's start solving.
auth.guestDesc: You're in. Sessions persist on this device only.
